scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.lint: npm -w apps/api run lint && npm -w apps/web run lint
scripts.typecheck: npm -w apps/api run typecheck && npm -w apps/web run typecheck
scripts.test: npm -w apps/api run test --if-present && npm -w apps/web run test --if-present
scripts.build: npm -w apps/api run build && npm -w apps/web run build
scripts.clean: rimraf apps/*/node_modules apps/*/.next apps/*/dist packages/*/node_modules node_modules
